nasb.text: When Jesus therefore saw her weeping, and the Jews who came with her also weeping, He was deeply moved in spirit and was troubled,

esv.text: When Jesus saw her weeping, and the Jews who had come with her also weeping, he was deeply moved in his spirit and greatly troubled.

cnv.text: 耶穌看見她在哭，和她一同來的猶太人也在哭，就心裡激動，難過起來，

ccb.text: 耶稣看见她和陪她来的犹太人都在哭，心中感动，十分难过，

csbs.text: 耶稣看见玛丽亚在哭，陪她一起来的犹太人也在哭，就灵里愤怒，内心烦扰。
